words.definition_en: sudden and unexpected, often in an unpleasant way
words.definition_vi: đột ngột, bất ngờ (thường gây khó chịu)
words.example: The bus came to an abrupt halt.

words.definition_en: something that is out of place in time, especially something that belongs to an earlier period
words.definition_vi: sự lỗi thời, sự nhầm lẫn về thời đại
words.example: She said that for her, a typewriter is an anachronism.

words.definition_en: happening or produced once a year
words.example: The company holds an annual general meeting.

words.definition_en: old and often valuable; an object made in an earlier period
words.example: He owns an antique desk from the 18th century.

words.definition_en: a period of 100 years
words.example: The castle was built over a century ago.

words.definition_en: arranged in the order in which events happened
words.example: The events were listed in chronological order.

words.definition_en: modern, or relating to the present time; existing or happening at the same time
words.example: She is an expert in contemporary art.

words.definition_en: a period of ten years
words.example: Prices have risen sharply over the last decade.

words.definition_en: the length of time that something continues or lasts
words.example: The course was of three years' duration.

words.definition_en: if time elapses, it goes past
words.example: Many years had elapsed since they last met.

words.definition_en: a period of time that has a particular quality or character
words.example: The fall of the Berlin Wall marked the end of an era.

words.definition_en: lasting forever or for a very long time
words.example: She promised him her eternal love.

words.definition_en: if something expires, it comes to an end or stops being valid
words.example: My passport expires next month.

words.definition_en: the number of times that something happens during a particular period
words.example: The frequency of bus services has been increased.

words.definition_en: happening immediately
words.example: The reaction of the audience was instantaneous.

words.definition_en: intended to last for only a short time until something permanent is found
words.example: An interim government was set up after the revolution.

words.definition_en: a period of time between two events
words.definition_vi: khoảng thời gian nghỉ, khoảng cách
words.example: There will be a short interval between the two acts.

words.definition_en: a short period of time when you fail to do something correctly; a period of time between two events
words.definition_vi: sự lơ đễnh, sự trôi qua, khoảng thời gian gián đoạn
words.example: A lapse of concentration caused the accident.

words.definition_en: the period of time during which someone is alive or something exists
words.example: She has lived in this village for a lifetime.

words.definition_en: having existed for a long time
words.example: They have a long-standing agreement to meet every year.

words.definition_en: a period of 1,000 years
words.example: The church celebrated its first millennium last year.

words.definition_en: no longer used because something newer and better has been invented
words.definition_vi: lỗi thời, không còn sử dụng
words.example: Gas lamps became obsolete after the invention of electric lights.

words.definition_en: if something is overdue, it should have happened or been done before now
words.example: The library books are three weeks overdue.

words.definition_en: a particular length of time
words.example: The 1920s was a period of great social change.

words.definition_en: happening or existing for a long time or for all time in the future
words.example: She is looking for a permanent job.

words.definition_en: a particular stage of a process that involves several stages
words.example: The first phase of the project is complete.

words.definition_en: to decide that something will not be done at the time when it was planned
words.example: The meeting has been postponed until next week.

words.definition_en: happening or existing before something else
words.example: I had a prior engagement and couldn't attend.

words.definition_en: immediate or quick; happening without delay
words.example: We received a prompt reply to our letter.

words.definition_en: if something is provisional, it is intended to be changed later
words.example: We have made a provisional booking for the hotel.

words.definition_en: arriving or happening at exactly the time that has been arranged
words.example: She is always very punctual for appointments.

words.definition_en: available or happening only at particular times of the year
words.example: Fruit picking is a seasonal job.

words.definition_en: happening or existing at the same time
words.example: There were simultaneous explosions in three different cities.

words.definition_en: to continue for a particular amount of time; the length of time that something lasts
words.definition_vi: kéo dài qua; quãng thời gian
words.example: His career spanned half a century.

words.definition_en: a short period of time
words.definition_vi: một đợt, một khoảng thời gian ngắn
words.example: We had a spell of cold weather last month.

words.definition_en: a period of time spent doing something
words.definition_vi: một khoảng thời gian làm việc
words.example: He did a two-year stint in the army.

words.definition_en: happening or coming after something else
words.example: Subsequent events proved that he was right.

words.definition_en: existing or lasting for only a limited period of time
words.example: I'm looking for a temporary job for the summer.

words.definition_en: happening at the most useful or suitable time
words.example: The warning was very timely and saved many lives.

words.definition_en: old and of very high quality; characteristic of a particular period
words.definition_vi: cổ điển, đặc trưng cho một thời kỳ
words.example: She collects vintage clothing.

words.definition_en: the government departments that manage a country
words.definition_vi: ngành công chức, dịch vụ công
words.example: He has a high-ranking job in the civil service.

words.definition_en: someone who pays for a professional person or organisation to help them
words.definition_vi: khách hàng (sử dụng dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp)
words.example: The lawyer spent the morning meeting with clients.

words.definition_en: someone you work with
words.example: I asked a colleague to help me with the report.

words.definition_en: an expert whose job is to give advice and help to people in a particular subject
words.definition_vi: cố vấn, chuyên gia tư vấn
words.example: She works as a marketing consultant.

words.definition_en: successful, and achieving the results that you want
words.definition_vi: hiệu quả (đạt kết quả mong muốn)
words.example: The new law has been very effective in reducing crime.

words.definition_en: working or operating quickly and effectively in an organised way
words.example: The new system is much more efficient than the old one.

words.definition_en: a senior manager in a business or other organisation
words.example: He is a top executive in a large multinational company.

words.definition_en: to make someone leave their job, especially because they have done something wrong
words.example: She was fired for being late every day.

words.definition_en: to try to persuade someone who has a high-level job to leave it and join another company
words.example: He was headhunted by a rival law firm.

words.definition_en: a period of time when you are allowed to be away from work
words.example: She is on maternity leave.

words.definition_en: the ways in which a company encourages people to buy its products
words.example: The company is spending more money on marketing.

words.definition_en: a large company that has offices or factories in many different countries
words.definition_vi: đa quốc gia; công ty đa quốc gia
words.example: She works for a large multinational corporation.

words.definition_en: a move to a higher level in an organisation
words.example: He is hoping for a promotion next year.

words.definition_en: the possibility that something will happen in the future, especially a good thing
words.example: The job offers excellent career prospects.

words.definition_en: the parts of a country's economy that are controlled by the government / by private companies
words.definition_vi: khu vực công / khu vực tư nhân
words.example: Jobs in the public sector usually offer better security.

words.definition_en: to get someone to work in a company or join an organisation; someone who has just joined a company or organisation
words.example: The company is recruiting more staff.

words.definition_en: if someone is redundant, they have been told they must leave their job because they are no longer needed
words.definition_vi: dư thừa, bị sa thải (do thu hẹp quy mô)
words.example: The factory closed and 500 workers were made redundant.

words.definition_en: to tell someone they can no longer work at their job (informal)
words.example: He got the sack for being rude to a customer.

words.definition_en: to stop working because of a disagreement with your employer; a period of time when workers stop working
words.example: The train drivers are going on strike.

words.definition_en: an organisation that represents the people who work in a particular industry
words.example: The union is negotiating a pay rise for its members.

words.definition_en: appear or happen suddenly or unexpectedly
words.definition_vi: nảy sinh, xuất hiện bất ngờ
words.example: Something's cropped up, so I'm afraid I won't be able to make it.

words.definition_en: start doing something in a very enthusiastic way
words.definition_vi: bắt đầu một việc gì đó một cách nhiệt tình
words.example: As soon as the food was brought out, everyone dived in.

words.definition_en: be in a particular place or state after doing something or because of doing it
words.definition_vi: kết thúc ở, rốt cuộc thì
words.example: We ended up having to scrap the whole campaign.

words.definition_en: begin (with)
words.example: Let's kick off this session by introducing ourselves.

words.definition_en: stop working
words.example: I usually knock off work at about half five.

words.definition_en: start working hard, especially when you should have done this earlier
words.definition_vi: bắt đầu làm việc chăm chỉ, nghiêm túc
words.example: It's time to knuckle down and get on with your homework.

words.definition_en: end someone's employment, especially temporarily, because there is not enough work for them; stop doing or using something
words.definition_vi: sa thải (do thiếu việc); ngừng làm/dùng việc gì
words.example: The company's announced it's laying off over 1,000 workers.

words.definition_en: if something lies ahead, it is going to happen to you in the future
words.definition_vi: đang chờ đợi ở phía trước (tương lai)
words.example: No teenager really knows what lies ahead for them career-wise.

words.definition_en: work at different times from usual because you have not worked enough at the normal times
words.example: Mona's going to leave early but she says she'll make up the hours tomorrow.

words.definition_en: continue doing something in a determined way, despite difficulties, opposition or interruptions
words.definition_vi: tiếp tục kiên trì thực hiện, thúc đẩy
words.example: I'll try to press ahead with it anyway.

words.definition_en: start doing or working on something in order to achieve an aim
words.definition_vi: bắt đầu thực hiện (với một mục tiêu cụ thể)
words.example: I didn't set out to be a millionaire - I just wanted to run a successful business.

words.definition_en: if you are snowed under, you have too much of sth to deal with
words.example: I'm so snowed under with work at the moment.

words.definition_en: start to employ someone; accept some work or responsibility
words.example: I'll hopefully be able to take on a part-time assistant.

words.definition_en: help someone to get to the end of a difficult period of time, especially by giving them money until they can get some more
words.definition_vi: giúp ai vượt qua khó khăn (thường bằng tiền bạc)
words.example: Could you lend me some money to tide me over to the end of the month?

words.definition_en: spend time in a relaxed way when you have nothing else to do
words.example: Josh can while away a whole day playing online games.

words.definition_en: end or finish something gradually; gradually reduce work before stopping completely; relax after a period of excitement or worry
words.definition_vi: kết thúc dần dần; nghỉ ngơi thư giãn
words.example: They're planning to wind down their operation in Greece.

words.definition_en: used for saying that it is better to solve a problem now, rather than leave it until later when it may be more difficult to deal with
words.definition_vi: việc hôm nay chớ để ngày mai; giải quyết sớm để tránh rắc rối sau này
words.example: I thought the photocopier needed a service - a stitch in time saves nine!

words.definition_en: used for telling someone to wait for something and not try to make you hurry
words.definition_vi: mọi việc đều có thời điểm của nó; đừng vội vàng
words.example: You'll get your results soon, all in good time.

words.word: at the drop of a hat
words.definition_en: immediately or in a way that shows that you have no doubts about doing something
words.definition_vi: ngay lập tức, không chút do dự
words.example: If you need help, I'll be there at the drop of a hat.

words.definition_en: used for saying that something happened or existed before you were born or before you lived or worked somewhere
words.example: The old factory was closed down long before your time.

words.definition_en: permanently, without the possibility of change in the future
words.example: He's given up smoking for good.

words.definition_en: for now
words.example: I'm staying with my parents for the time being.

words.definition_en: sometimes, but not often
words.example: We see each other from time to time.

words.definition_en: an extremely long time
words.example: I haven't seen her in donkey's years.

words.definition_en: just in time to prevent something bad happening
words.definition_vi: vừa kịp lúc (để tránh rắc rối)
words.example: The ambulance arrived in the nick of time.

words.definition_en: very rarely
words.definition_vi: hiếm khi, năm thì mười họa
words.example: He goes to the cinema once in a blue moon.

words.word: on the spur of the moment
words.definition_en: if you do something on the spur of the moment, you do it suddenly and do not take time to plan it or think carefully about it
words.definition_vi: bất chợt, ngẫu hứng, không chuẩn bị trước
words.example: I invited them to dinner on the spur of the moment.

words.definition_en: recently
words.example: I saw Sandra in the street the other day.

exercises.label: A
exercises.instruction: Write a word from the box in each gap.

items.sentence: 'I'll only be working here for a couple of weeks. I'm a ___ worker.'
items.explanation: 'a couple of weeks' (vài tuần) chỉ một khoảng thời gian ngắn, không ổn định nên dùng 'temporary' (tạm thời).

items.sentence: 'It couldn't have happened at a better time! What a ___ arrival!'
items.explanation: 'at a better time' (đúng lúc tốt nhất) tương đương với 'timely' (kịp thời/đúng lúc).

items.sentence: 'It depends on the time of year. It's a ___ problem.'
items.explanation: 'time of year' (thời điểm trong năm) liên quan đến mùa màng, nên dùng 'seasonal' (theo mùa).

items.sentence: 'I get to work at nine o'clock on the dot every day. I try to be ___ '
items.explanation: 'nine o'clock on the dot' (đúng 9 giờ không lệch) chỉ sự 'punctual' (đúng giờ).

items.sentence: 'We both said it at exactly the same time. Our answer was ___ .'
items.explanation: 'exactly the same time' (chính xác cùng một lúc) là định nghĩa của 'simultaneous' (đồng thời).

items.sentence: 'We can't use that software on our new computers. It's ___ !'
items.explanation: Phần mềm không còn dùng được trên máy tính mới là phần mềm 'obsolete' (lỗi thời).

items.sentence: 'It's the first draft of the text. We can change it later if we want. It's only ___ .'
items.explanation: 'first draft' (bản thảo đầu) và 'change later' (thay đổi sau) chỉ tính chất 'provisional' (tạm thời/dự kiến).

items.sentence: 'They should have sent that to us ages ago. It's long ___ .'
items.explanation: 'should have sent... ages ago' (đáng lẽ phải gửi từ lâu rồi) nghĩa là nó đã 'overdue' (quá hạn).

exercises.label: B
exercises.instruction: Write a word from the box in each gap.

items.sentence: We live in a/an ___ of mass communication.
items.explanation: 'Era of mass communication' (kỷ nguyên truyền thông đại chúng) là một cụm từ phổ biến.

items.sentence: After a short ___ of being unemployed, I decided to set up my own business.
items.explanation: 'a short spell' chỉ một khoảng thời gian ngắn làm việc gì đó hoặc trong trạng thái nào đó.

items.sentence: It was in the twentieth ___ that humans first developed nuclear weapons.
items.explanation: 'Twentieth century' (thế kỷ 20) là đơn vị thời gian phù hợp với lịch sử phát triển vũ khí hạt nhân.

items.sentence: Despite advances in technology, no human being will ever live for a ___ in my opinion.
items.explanation: 'Millennium' (1000 năm) là khoảng thời gian quá dài mà con người không thể sống tới.

items.sentence: The council is planning to increase the ___ of buses to the city centre.
items.explanation: 'Frequency of buses' (tần suất xe buýt) là cách diễn đạt đúng khi nói về số chuyến xe.

items.sentence: I did a brief ___ in the navy, and then decided it wasn't for me.
items.explanation: 'Stint' dùng để chỉ một khoảng thời gian cố định làm một công việc cụ thể (ví dụ: nghĩa vụ quân sự).

items.sentence: I've got a very short concentration ___ .
items.explanation: 'Concentration span' (khoảng thời gian tập trung) là một cụm từ cố định.

items.sentence: It's just a ___ that most teenagers go through. Don't worry!
items.explanation: 'Phase' chỉ một giai đoạn trong quá trình phát triển (giai đoạn tuổi teen).

items.sentence: I am writing to thank the organisation for the (1) ___ service I received
items.explanation: 'Prompt service' (dịch vụ nhanh chóng) là lời khen phù hợp trong thư cảm ơn.

items.sentence: when my membership (2) ___.
items.explanation: Thành viên (membership) thì dùng 'expired' (hết hạn).

items.sentence: I am a (3) ___ member of the Chavershaw
items.explanation: 'Long-standing member' (thành viên lâu năm) chỉ sự gắn bó lâu dài.

items.sentence: (4) ___ Car Club
items.explanation: 'Vintage Car Club' là tên phổ biến cho câu lạc bộ xe cổ.

items.sentence: having spent most of my (5) ___ working with cars
items.explanation: 'Spend most of my lifetime' (dành hầu hết cuộc đời) phù hợp với ngữ cảnh làm việc lâu dài.

items.sentence: built in the (6) ___ fallowing the first World War
items.explanation: 'Decade' (thập kỷ) chỉ khoảng thời gian 10 năm sau thế chiến thứ nhất.

items.sentence: granted the status of '(7) ___ member'
items.explanation: 'Permanent member' (thành viên vĩnh viễn) là một chức danh.

items.sentence: for the (8) ___ I spent as Chairperson
items.explanation: 'Period' (khoảng thời gian) chỉ quãng thời gian làm chủ tịch.

items.sentence: to receive a rather (9) ___ e-mail
items.explanation: 'Abrupt email' (email cộc lốc/đột ngột) mang sắc thái không hài lòng.

items.sentence: since three months had (10) ___
items.explanation: 'Elapsed' là động từ dùng cho thời gian trôi qua.

items.sentence: to attend the (11) ___ dinner next month
items.explanation: 'Annual dinner' (bữa tối hàng năm) là sự kiện thường niên của câu lạc bộ.

items.sentence: I received a (12) ___ e-mail from the same person
items.explanation: 'Subsequent email' (email sau đó) chỉ email gửi đến sau khi tác giả đã phản hồi.

items.sentence: was literally (13) ___
items.explanation: 'Instantaneous' (tức thì) diễn tả việc thay đổi trạng thái thành viên diễn ra ngay lập tức.

items.sentence: meeting up with some of my (14) ___
items.explanation: 'Contemporaries' (những người cùng thời/cùng lứa) phù hợp với buổi họp mặt câu lạc bộ.

exercises.label: D
exercises.instruction: Write a word from the boxes in each gap.

items.sentence: Would you like to work for a large ___ corporation?
items.explanation: 'Multinational corporation' (tập đoàn đa quốc gia) là cụm từ cố định.

items.sentence: How much budget is there for the ___ campaign?
items.explanation: 'Marketing campaign' (chiến dịch tiếp thị) là cụm từ cố định.

items.sentence: Charlene is a freelance business ___ ; companies hire her to solve particular problems they are facing.
items.explanation: Người được thuê để giải quyết vấn đề cho công ty là 'consultant' (cố vấn/tư vấn).

items.sentence: My dad's a senior ___ in a huge American corporation.
items.explanation: 'Senior executive' (giám đốc/người điều hành cấp cao) là một vị trí công việc.

items.sentence: The advertising campaign was ___ in that it increased sales by over 50%.
items.explanation: 'Effective' (hiệu quả) vì nó mang lại kết quả cụ thể (tăng doanh số).

items.sentence: Robots are often much more ___ than people because they can work 24 hours a day without getting tired, and they don't make mistakes!
items.explanation: 'Efficient' (năng suất/hiệu suất cao) vì làm việc liên tục không lỗi và không lãng phí.

items.sentence: The paper had to make several journalists ___ last week due to loss of sales.
items.explanation: 'Make sb redundant' là sa thải vì công ty gặp khó khăn/không cần vị trí đó nữa.

items.sentence: Darren's home on ___ from the army at the moment.
items.explanation: 'On leave' (đang trong kỳ nghỉ phép) thường dùng trong quân đội.

items.sentence: How long is the union planning to ___ for?
items.explanation: Công đoàn (union) thường liên quan đến hoạt động 'strike' (đình công).

items.sentence: They wouldn't ___ someone just for stealing a bit of stationery, would they?
items.explanation: 'Fire' (sa thải) do nhân viên phạm lỗi (trộm đồ văn phòng).

items.sentence: Sue used to work here, but then she was ___ by a major law firm.
items.explanation: 'Headhunted' (được săn đầu người) khi một công ty khác tìm đến tuyển dụng nhân tài.

items.sentence: I can't believe they ___ Jack just for taking a few paperclips home with him.
items.explanation: 'Sacked' (bị đuổi việc) là cách nói thông tục của sa thải khi phạm lỗi nhẹ.

items.sentence: why not consider a career in the (1) state / civil service?
items.explanation: 'Civil service' (ngành công chức) là cụm từ chuẩn.

items.sentence: Working in the public (2) area / sector provides job security
items.explanation: 'Public sector' (khu vực công) là thuật ngữ kinh tế.

items.sentence: There are excellent (3) prospects / predictions for promotion
items.explanation: 'Career prospects' (triển vọng nghề nghiệp) là cụm từ cố định.

items.sentence: for (4) promotion / progress
items.explanation: 'Promotion' (sự thăng chức) phù hợp với ngữ cảnh thăng tiến trong công việc.

items.sentence: working with highly experienced and professional (5) colleagues / clients
items.explanation: Làm việc cùng với những người khác trong cùng môi trường là 'colleagues' (đồng nghiệp).

items.sentence: be part of a (6) club / union.
items.explanation: 'Union' (công đoàn) là tổ chức bảo vệ quyền lợi người lao động.

items.sentence: We want to (7) recruit / elect the brightest and the best.
items.explanation: Trong tuyển dụng nhân sự, ta dùng 'recruit' (tuyển dụng).

items.sentence: I'm so ___ under with work at the moment - it's awful!
items.explanation: 'Snowed under with work' (ngập đầu trong công việc) là cụm từ phrasal verb cố định.

items.sentence: The company's announced it's ___ off over 1,000 workers.
items.explanation: 'Lay off' (sa thải do thiếu việc/thu hẹp quy mô).

items.sentence: They're planning to ___ down their operation in Greece
items.explanation: 'Wind down' (thu hẹp/dừng dần dần hoạt động kinh doanh).

items.sentence: I'll try to ___ ahead with it anyway.
items.explanation: 'Press ahead/on' (tiếp tục thực hiện một cách quyết tâm).

items.sentence: Something's ___ up, so I'm afraid I won't be able to make it
items.explanation: 'Crop up' (xảy ra bất ngờ).

items.sentence: Could you lend me some money to ___ me over to the end of the month?
items.explanation: 'Tide sb over' (giúp ai vượt qua giai đoạn khó khăn tài chính).

items.sentence: I didn't ___ out to be a millionaire
items.explanation: 'Set out to do sth' (bắt đầu với ý định làm gì).

items.sentence: Mona's going to leave early... she'll ___ up the hours tomorrow.
items.explanation: 'Make up' (làm bù giờ).

exercises.label: G
exercises.instruction: Write a phrasal verb from the box in the correct form in each gap.

items.sentence: If the business does well, I'll hopefully be able to ___ a part-time assistant in the spring.
items.explanation: 'Take on' (tuyển dụng nhân viên).

items.sentence: We ___ having to scrap the whole advertising campaign and start again.
items.explanation: 'Ended up' (rốt cuộc thì/kết thúc ở tình trạng nào đó).

items.sentence: Let's ___ this session by introducing ourselves, shall we?
items.explanation: 'Kick off' (bắt đầu một sự kiện/buổi họp).

items.sentence: Josh can ___ a whole day playing online computer games with his mates.
items.explanation: 'While away' (giết thời gian/dành thời gian thư giãn).

items.sentence: No teenager really knows what ___ for them career-wise in the future.
items.explanation: 'Lie ahead' (đang chờ đợi ở phía trước/tương lai).

items.sentence: That's enough TV! It's time to ___ and get on with your homework now.
items.explanation: 'Knuckle down' (bắt đầu làm việc nghiêm túc/chăm chỉ).

items.sentence: I usually ___ work at about half five so I'm home by six thirty most nights.
items.explanation: 'Knock off' (ngừng làm việc/tan sở).

items.sentence: As soon as the food was brought out, everyone ___ and helped themselves.
items.explanation: 'Dive in' (bắt đầu một việc gì đó nhiệt tình, ở đây là ăn uống).

exercises.label: H
exercises.instruction: Phrasal verbs with away are often connected to the idea of an action continuing for a long time. Which of these phrasal verbs with away are also connected to this idea?

items.sentence: Mary was **beavering away** at her desk when I last popped in to see her.
items.explanation: 'Beaver away' (làm việc cần mẫn trong thời gian dài).

items.sentence: Let's **break away** from the main crowd and go over there for a while.
items.explanation: 'Break away' (tách ra khỏi một nhóm).

items.sentence: You can't **explain it away** as a simple mistake.
items.explanation: 'Explain away' (cố gắng bào chữa/giảm nhẹ mức độ sai lầm).

items.sentence: I think I'll **give these old clothes away**.
items.explanation: 'Give away' (tặng/cho đi).

items.sentence: I've been **hammering away** at this keyboard for hours.
items.explanation: 'Hammer away' (làm việc miệt mài/đánh máy liên tục).

items.sentence: your great-grandfather **passed away** during the night.
items.explanation: 'Pass away' (qua đời).

items.sentence: Keep **plodding away** and you'll finish your novel eventually.
items.explanation: 'Plod away' (làm việc chậm rãi nhưng bền bỉ).

items.sentence: We've been **slaving away** all morning.
items.explanation: 'Slave away' (làm việc cực nhọc như nô lệ trong thời gian dài).

items.sentence: Can we hear Carol **typing away** at her keyboard from the living room.
items.explanation: 'Type away' (đánh máy liên tục).

items.sentence: He's **working away** on some designs at the moment.
items.explanation: 'Work away' (tiếp tục làm việc chăm chỉ).

exercises.label: I
exercises.instruction: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: The President's just been elected to a second term ___ office.
items.explanation: 'Term of office' (nhiệm kỳ).

items.sentence: I don't know how anyone can sit in front of a computer for hours ___ end.
items.explanation: 'Hours on end' (nhiều giờ liền).

items.sentence: My great-grandmother used to work ___ a servant in a huge mansion.
items.explanation: 'Work as + nghề nghiệp' (làm nghề gì).

items.sentence: My exam results should come ___ day now.
items.explanation: 'Any day now' (bất cứ ngày nào kể từ bây giờ).

items.sentence: Applicants must be at least 18 years ___ age.
items.explanation: 'Years of age' (tuổi).

items.sentence: You'd better start working a bit harder or you'll be ___ of a job!
items.explanation: 'Out of a job' (thất nghiệp).

items.sentence: Never mind ___ you get paid for it or not, you can't work this weekend.
items.explanation: 'Never mind whether... or not' (đừng quan tâm dù có... hay không).

items.sentence: ___ the time Jeremy got there, we'd already left.
items.explanation: 'By the time' (vào lúc/trước lúc).

exercises.label: J
exercises.instruction: Complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given.

items.sentence: The government needs to stop this ridiculous bureaucratic system. (put) -> The government needs to ___ this ridiculous bureaucratic system.
items.explanation: 'Put an end to sth' (chấm dứt cái gì).

items.sentence: No one except Jake has ever beaten me at a game of chess. (only) -> Jake ___ beat me at a game of chess.
items.answer: is the only person to ever
items.explanation: 'The only person to ever do sth' (người duy nhất từng làm gì).

items.sentence: It's time we began to sort through these cupboards. (start) -> It's time we ___ through these cupboards.
items.explanation: 'Make a start on sth' (bắt đầu làm gì).

items.sentence: Julie asked for a second's thinking time before she answered. (just) -> 'Could ___ think before I answer?' asked Julie.
items.answer: I just have a second to
items.explanation: 'Have a second to think' (có một giây để nghĩ).

items.sentence: I can't really remember the last time I had a day off. (ages) -> It feels ___ I had a day off.
items.explanation: 'It feels like ages since' (đã từ rất lâu rồi kể từ khi).

items.sentence: Sorry, Alan, but right now I'm rather busy. (in) -> Sorry, Alan, but at ___ I'm rather busy.
items.explanation: 'At this moment in time' (ngay lúc này).

items.sentence: They painted the wall very well. (made) -> They ___ the wall.
items.answer: made a good job of painting
items.explanation: 'Make a good job of sth' (làm tốt việc gì).

exercises.label: K
exercises.instruction: For each question, write one word which can be used in all three sentences.

items.sentence: Jenny, ___ you've been here for three years... / I'm sure Harold was here just ___ , wasn't he? / You can share my computer for ___ , but...
items.explanation: 'Now that/Now' (vì giờ đây), 'just now' (vừa nãy), 'for now' (tạm thời).

items.sentence: Thanks so much for the flowers - they really made my ___ . / My grandparents love going on ___ trips... / You'd think that, in this ___ and age...
items.explanation: 'Make one's day' (làm ai hạnh phúc), 'day trips' (chuyến đi trong ngày), 'in this day and age' (trong thời đại này).

items.sentence: I was just ___ to go home, but that's okay. / It's ___ time you got home... / We're definitely going to have to do something ___ increasing...
items.explanation: 'Be about to do' (sắp sửa làm gì), 'it's about time' (đã đến lúc), 'do sth about' (làm gì đó để giải quyết).

items.sentence: I should get a reply from them any ___ now. / It'll only take them a ___ to update... / Now is the ___ of truth!
items.explanation: 'Any moment now' (bất cứ lúc nào), 'take a moment' (tốn một lát), 'moment of truth' (giây phút quyết định).

items.sentence: We're definitely living in the ___ of information. / This particular wine doesn't really mature with ___ . / It's time you started acting your ___ , young man!
items.explanation: 'Age of information' (thời đại thông tin), 'mature with age' (chín muồi theo thời gian), 'act your age' (hành xử đúng lứa tuổi).

items.sentence: It's just a typical 1960s ___ block. / The media start prying into your private life when you run for public ___ . / You'd better talk to Derek at head ___ .
items.explanation: 'Office block' (tòa nhà văn phòng), 'public office' (chức vụ công), 'head office' (trụ sở chính).

items.sentence: I began to realise in the ___ of the meeting... / We're going to have to decide on a ___ of action... / All they said was that they'd contact me in due ___ .
items.explanation: 'In the course of' (trong quá trình), 'course of action' (hướng giải quyết), 'in due course' (vào thời điểm thích hợp).

items.sentence: I do hope we're going to arrive ___ time. / How anyone could work in that office for years ___ end... / 'You're ___ !'
items.explanation: 'On time' (đúng giờ), 'years on end' (nhiều năm liền), 'You're on!' (Đồng ý/Cá luôn!).

exercises.label: L
exercises.instruction: Each of the words in bold is incorrect. Rewrite them correctly.

items.sentence: I haven't seen Carol in **monkey's** years.
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'in donkey's years' (trong một thời gian rất dài).

items.sentence: That was long before your **moment**.
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'before your time' (trước thời của bạn).

items.sentence: I was talking to Sandra... the **recent** day
items.explanation: 'The other day' (vài ngày trước/gần đây).

items.sentence: I realised in the **bill** of time.
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'in the nick of time' (vừa kịp lúc).

items.sentence: Tina's happy with her job for the time **coming**
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'for the time being' (trong lúc này/tạm thời).

items.sentence: take you out for a meal once in a blue **planet**
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'once in a blue moon' (hiếm khi).

items.sentence: given up smoking **with** good
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'for good' (vĩnh viễn).

items.sentence: trips from **once** to time
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'from time to time' (thỉnh thoảng).

items.sentence: invited Graham to dinner on the **edge** of the moment.
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'on the spur of the moment' (bất chợt/ngẫu hứng).

items.sentence: I'll be there at the drop of a **pen**!
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'at the drop of a hat' (ngay lập tức).

items.sentence: 'Not yet. All in **nice** time!'
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'all in good time' (mọi thứ đều có lúc của nó).

items.sentence: a **repair** in time saves nine
items.explanation: Thành ngữ đúng là 'a stitch in time saves nine'.

exercises.label: M
exercises.instruction: Each of the words in bold is in an incorrect form. Rewrite them correctly.

items.sentence: The salary they offered me exceeded my wildest **expecting**!
items.explanation: Cần danh từ số nhiều 'expectations' (kỳ vọng).

items.sentence: I hope I **last** his previous secretary
items.explanation: Cần động từ 'outlast' (tồn tại lâu hơn/làm việc lâu hơn ai đó).

items.sentence: difficult to become just another company **employer** again.
items.explanation: Ngữ cảnh là nhân viên công ty, nên dùng 'employee'.

items.sentence: Hargreaves & Son are one of our main **competitions**.
items.explanation: Cần danh từ chỉ đối thủ cạnh tranh 'competitors'.

items.sentence: There were over 100 **appliers** for the position
items.explanation: Người nộp đơn ứng tuyển là 'applicants'.

items.sentence: Your supervisor will be checking up on you **period**.
items.explanation: Cần trạng từ 'periodically' (một cách định kỳ).

items.sentence: the possibilities for expansion are **unending**.
items.explanation: 'Endless possibilities' là cụm từ phổ biến hơn để chỉ khả năng vô tận.

items.sentence: A good business suit is **timely** - it never goes out of fashion.
items.explanation: 'Timeless' (vượt thời gian/không bao giờ lỗi mốt).

items.sentence: The building looks a bit **future** from the outside
items.explanation: Cần tính từ 'futuristic' (thuộc về tương lai/có phong cách tương lai).

items.sentence: You have to be prepared for every **event** in this line of work.
items.explanation: 'Eventuality' (tình huống có thể xảy ra/biến cố).

items.sentence: Getting angry with your boss is **productive**
items.explanation: 'Counterproductive' (phản tác dụng).

exercises.label: N
exercises.instruction: Write each of these words with counter- in the correct gap.

items.sentence: As a spy... I was often involved in ___ , where we tried to stop the enemy from discovering our secrets.
items.explanation: 'Counterintelligence' (phản gián).

items.sentence: The government will have to take some ___ to stop inflation from increasing.
items.explanation: 'Countermeasures' (biện pháp đối phó).

items.sentence: The reports... will hopefully ___ the government's inaccurate propaganda.
items.explanation: 'Counterbalance' (đối trọng/làm cân bằng lại) các thông tin tuyên truyền sai lệch.

items.sentence: The army's planning to mount a ___ later today.
items.explanation: 'Mount a counteroffensive' (mở một cuộc phản công - thuật ngữ quân sự).

items.sentence: You'll have to speak to my ___ in the New York office.
items.explanation: 'Counterpart' (người đồng cấp/người có vị trí tương đương ở tổ chức khác).

items.sentence: We have to ___ this rise in crime by toughening up the sentencing laws.
items.explanation: 'Counteract' (chống lại/làm mất tác dụng) sự gia tăng tội phạm.

items.sentence: art produced in the ___ .
items.explanation: 'Counterculture' (phản văn hóa - phong trào văn hóa đi ngược lại với số đông).

items.sentence: If he accuses me... I'm going to ___ by saying I know he lied...
items.explanation: 'Counterattack' (phản công/đáp trả lại lời cáo buộc).

exercises.label: O
exercises.instruction: Use the word given in capitals at the end of the line to form a word that fits in the space in the same line.

items.sentence: It is not (1) ___ that, during her premiership, Britain went through a period of...
items.explanation: (INCIDENT) 'It is not incidental' (không phải là ngẫu nhiên).

items.sentence: went through a period of (2) ___ change.
items.explanation: (MOMENT) 'Momentous change' (thay đổi quan trọng/có tính lịch sử).

items.sentence: changing Britain's (3) ___ union laws
items.explanation: (ANTIQUE) 'Antiquated laws' (những luật lệ cũ kỹ/lỗi thời).

items.sentence: creation of a modern, (4) ___ economy
items.explanation: (COMPETE) 'Competitive economy' (nền kinh tế có tính cạnh tranh).

items.sentence: which required much higher (5) ___ , efficiency
items.explanation: (PRODUCE) 'Productivity' (năng suất).

items.sentence: on the part of the (6) ___ than in the past.
items.explanation: (WORK) 'Workforce' (lực lượng lao động).

items.sentence: which was responsible for running companies, rather than unions or the government.
items.explanation: (MANAGE) 'Management' (ban quản lý/sự quản lý).

items.sentence: point to the very high (8) ___ figures of the 1980s
items.explanation: (EMPLOY) 'Unemployment figures' (số liệu thất nghiệp).

items.sentence: the official (9) ___ total had risen
items.explanation: (JOB) 'Jobless total' (tổng số người không có việc làm).

items.sentence: Some saw her resignation as (10) ___ , and wished she would continue.
items.explanation: (TIME) 'Untimely resignation' (sự từ chức không đúng lúc/đáng tiếc).

items.sentence: Even today, (11) ___ and economists are divided
items.explanation: (HISTORY) 'Historians' (nhà sử học).
